review_text: Modern and extremely clean. Close to shops, but tranquil.

A powered site in a park convenient for our purpose, we have stayed here a few times and recently noticed the loss of powered caravan sites  and the increased in cabin building within the park. Previously there were a couple of in-powered sites where we had seen swags and roof top tent travellers staying, not so now but short caravan sites instead.
We stayed there the night before and night of my wedding. The staff were fantastic and so accommodating. Would recommend to anyone.
Great park, great ensuite with a wonderful location.
All good

Family cabin, for 6. We arrived super late but had called through in advance to let reception know. Very friendly and communication was good. The key and map had been left in the lock box for us.

Kitchen had been revamped, the bathroom was large in size (bigger than other cabins we’ve stayed in) and the two bedrooms weren’t bad.
In the master, it was a bit squashed, just enough room on each side of the bed to walk. The 2nd room had 2 sets of bunks, which could fit our two 5’11” daughters and two youngest children.
Beds were comfortable for everyone but myself (I prefer a very firm bed) but for 1 night it suited us.

Location was easy to find. However, I’m not sure what is next door but the loud mega phone announcements may put other travellers off. Especially if staying more than 1-2 nights.

Key return was easy. The reception staff were well mannered and happy. Cannot fault them.

Great location for the historic Eureka Stockade area,  we had a car so easy to get around Ballarat, supermarket 600m away.  The park itself was easy to navigate, easy after hours check-in for us.  Budget villa 2 bedroom was clean, shower was lovely and beds very comfortable.  Didn’t use kitchen but it had all the essentials for cooking.  Good amenities such as games room, camp kitchen, bbq, laundry.  A fabulous outdoor pool complex next to the park which is free for park guests.
A very enjoyable stay.
The staff were lovely, facilities were amazing and comfortable. Great place to stay

This place is a hidden gem in Ballarat.
Great staff.
Great facilities.
Great pool next door which is free.
Nice and quiet location; the cabin was great, the bed was nice and comfy, and the shower was great.
Will be definitely staying here again.

Right next to the swimming pool for lots of family fun in summer. New basket ball court is a hit. Beautiful big shady trees provide plenty of shade. Toilets and showers are clean. Small drive into Ballarat City.

Lovely venue with lots of trees surrounding the sites and cabins. The neighbouring pool is a great asset. Awesome location with all tourist spots we were seeing being around 10 minutes away.
Updated cabins are really nice. If in 2nd bedroom, bring a heater or fan as the air-con is in the master bedroom, which is limited if the door is shut. The 5 person standard cabin can only fit 3 comfortably...and only for a couple of nights.

Tired and rundown - which is a shame. Games Room is full of broken, out-of-order games. No kids playground.  Cabin was old, rough, and not overly clean. Man on reception didnt smile at all.  2nd stay for us, but will be our last.
Clean, well maintained and awesome overall experience.
1 room cabins were perfect for a couple nights and great customer service
Awful and expensive for a tiny patch of uneven black gravel.  Very tired and old.  Everything is broken or needing repair.  Total rip-off. $70 per night.  Won't be back here.
Hired a cabin that sleeps 5, small but quaint. Comfortable bed, nice hot shower, easy and quick check in, nice location
The best tidy caravan park. Our cabin was so comfortable.  Staff so helpful.

The staff were really friendly and kids enjoyed the games room and new basketball court. Good value for money. We stayed in a caravan ensuite site. The only issue we had was the ensuite not serviced at all over the 7 nights we were there, we kept having to go the reception to get more toilet paper and dry towels which was a disappointment.

We were in the tent and it was freezing.

Toilets were a bit far away.
Great place to stay and it is remote to all attractions and in the summer it would be a great place to stay because it is next door to the local pool

A decent place to stay for a bit
But is it value for money

Tough to make a clear case
Lovely caravan park well situated near the middle of the city but still with a nice country feel
Nice
Love the location, all new interior renewed unit.  Nice and warm with the aircon.  Shower great with heated light.  Staff very friendly.   Place to park.
Nice and clean cabins.
Good location to base out of for work or Play

Great place to spend the night. Cabin was perfect for myself and my young grandson. Hope to stay again for a longer period in the near future.
Host was very helpful and accommodating, beds very comfy, great shower with great water pressure. Very tidy cabin
We stayed here for 2 weeks, we had a drive through spot which was large enough. Staff were lovely and to top it off amenities were clean. Would recommend and come again.
Great service and friendly staff

I loved the free access to the Eureka Swimming Pool. It was so warm and the staff friendly and community minded. They lent us some goggles. AJ loved the huge games room so bring coins.  Hopefully wi-fi will work consistently next time. Beautiful location in the trees.
Great cabin with good facilities

Pros and cons.  The cabin was a standard cabin with as it turned out (it wasn't obvious in the booking) a separate ensuite bathroom.  Only one step down and one step across from the cabin.  Ok cabin and a lovely big bathroom with a heater.  My problem is the number of times I use the bathroom in the night.  I found it confronting to go outside during the night and I had trouble with step down. (Arthritis)
Stayed in one of the Villas with my friend. Very well equipped clean villa. Service is excellent.  Close to everything.  Linen was amazing. Only issue was TV's are mounted to high
Clean tidy friendly great location,  what more could you ask for
Great place to stay, would definitely go back again.

Very comfortable cottage.  Clean, quiet and friendly staff.  Very comfortable bed.  Excellent gas cook top and kitchen.  Value for money.  The shower was hot and strong water pressure.  We were able to watch our favourite channels on the TV on Youtube.

We stayed on a powered site in our caravan here with 3 kids 2 adults. Most sites are drive through and some have cemented awning spaces. The staff were wonderful on every interaction, and the park is tidy, well laid out with nice sites. We were very impressed and thoroughly enjoyed our 5 night stay here.

We find the accommodation in the cabins to be excellent, clean, beds are very comfortable and staff are friendly and helpful. My only problem is the TVs are placed a bit to high for me to watch comfortably. Also like that the heating/air-conditioning is on when we arrive.

A great place.
Very well looked after
Clean
Beautiful trees
Quiet other than kids on bikes and happily playing. Fast check in and outs.
Great 👍 we could use fantastic pools next door.. a side gate would be great
We stayed at cabin 34 and couldn't fault it.

We stayed here with our 2 small kids (23 mo and nearly 5) in a 2 bedroom budget cottage for 4 nights The cabin was small, but perfect for what we needed, with all of the creature comforts including AirCon which was much needed on a couple of really hot days.

Mini Golf was a bit hit, and we went to the pool next door a couple of time too, free entry when you're staying at the Park.

Everything was fantastic and we had an excellent time. Only negative to note is that the playground had been removed, something our kids were looking forward to, and the pictures on booking.com were not accurate for what we booked (it was probably better, but smaller).

Otherwise, could not fault Eureka Holiday Park. Great location, so close to everything, very comfy beds. We even had a decent sized kitchen for reheating meals and making picnic lunches for each day as we explored the area. Would definitely recommend!!
Yet another January visit. This year, there are no Australian Road Cycling Championships! So it was just a visit to catch up with Ballarat! The Holiday Park provided a great setting again.

It's a nice, small holiday park. It's much smaller in size compared to a Big 4 and the amenities are fewer. But if you're looking for no frills getaway then check out Eureka Stockade in Ballarat. The cabins are of decent size. The rooms were clean with fresh sheets. It had a small living and dining space which is perfect for a small family. The one we stayed in had 2 rooms with kids' room having 2 bunk beds. There is also an aquatic centre right beside it, which they give you free access to. Overall, it was a good experience. Just don't expect it to be as big as a big 4.
Amazing staff, comfortable beds and pillows. Great cabin  awesome park and free access to pool next door. Definitely staying again.
As always ,clean and tidy cabins and good amenities and good service
Cabin cold / warm and clean. Sleeping rooms for five was spacious enough for five.. Dinning/ lounge area too small to cater for five people. Only two chairs.
End of November.  2 nights $100 -$10 for G'day  member so $90. Clean level site. A 5min walk to Eureka stockade museum. Walking trails.  Very good.
Clean and tidy amenities staff here are very helpful. Very close to all the attractions around Ballarat 👌
Close to everything good clean comfy accommodation

As a family of four (children being 3 and 6) we had an AMAZING experience at this caravan park. It’s a quiet little caravan park and when we were there, there was HEAPS of families there. All the staff were absolutely amazing and kind. The gaming area needs a little work done to it but for what it was, it was great! I loved they had options for the younger kids to play as well as the older kids AND adults.
The mini golf needs a bit of maintenance done to it as it’s quite worn down but never the less my sons had a blast in there.
I loved that if we had any questions the staff always were willing to help and had a smile on their faces.

The cabin we were in was clean, smelt lovely, the heater/air con worked wonders and the master bed was SO COMFORTABLE.
Shower also had phenomenal pressure and hot.

Thank you so much for having us.

We stayed 3 nights had a gravel site which didn’t have space for the caravan awning to set up . Facilities were good , staff lovely but  our site total rubbish. Particularly for the money they are charging .

Friendly and helpful staff.
A good location for exploring Ballarat and surrounds.
We had a good drive through ensuite site for our caravan.

Great little get away for a couple of nights. Everything was clean and in working order. Kids enjoyed the park and rec room.
Only let down sre the rowdy locals. Loud cars & burnouts throughout the late night/early hours of the morning.
Staff were incredibly kind and helpful when needed.
Nice caravan park on the eastern side of Ballarat, we stayed in one of their cabins which was very nice.
Great location, quiet and neat and tidy. Friendly staff. Our cabin was perfect for the one night stay would come back
Terrible site stuck under big tree it was a terrible park we won't be back and couldn't recommend

We stayed in the three bedroom cabin for a weekend and it was fantastic. The cabin facilities were great. I had a wonderful sleep in the main bedroom, the shower was excellent, the couch was comfortable, everything you needed was in the kitchen. My family had a wonderful stay and we would definitely stay again.
Was wonderful to rock up to a warm room and extural bathroom.

Very happy with our stay, park is tidy, sites spacious and amenities clean. Ladies at front counter very friendly and helpful. 100% recommend. So much to see around the area like the lake, Botanical gardens, lookouts etc. just amazing!

The cabins were surprisingly spacious for a holiday park; there were enough beds to fit at the most, six people. The heater worked very well, warming up just about every corner of the cabin. There was an electric blanket in the master bedroom and the living room sofa was very comfortable and large.

The bathroom wasn't like most of the other bathrooms we had stayed in during our trip, it was very warm for being in the winter. Although the warmth caused several ants to inhabit the area near the window and toilet.

Another issue was that the park's internet wasn't working in our area, hopefully that could be fixed in the future.

But other than that, a TV (not a smart TV, but cable is available) microwave, cutlery, plates and a stove were thoroughly cleaned and prepared. Thank you :).

地點好。4個單人床+1個雙人床，有洗衣房，有室內室外遊戲區。夏天游泳池。附近IGA超市。
去疏芬山礦場和巴拉瑞特動物園。剛好都在附近。停車在小木屋旁。木屋廚具烤箱微波爐、四個煮爐。還有齊全的烹煮工具，讓我們餐餐都可以省錢自己煮。另外附近走路7分鐘的IGA超市的牛排羊排，比市區的Coles和Woolworth的肉價格，便宜了幾乎一半。東西也新鮮。唯一小問題就是洗澡淋浴高度無法調整，亞洲人的高度覺得洗的很痛苦，頭髮一定會被噴濕，有些麻煩。如果可以調整就太好了。
櫃檯服務人員態度很友善。上下舖臥房很讚，但是沒有暖氣，去的時候0度，真的超冷。

但還是很喜歡這裡。下次來還是會選擇這裏。

Stayed a few nights for winter wonderlights and had a great experience
Facilities were clean and in perfect condition.
Kitchen area was big and fully stocked with cooking equipment
Large area for your van and cars, level ground so minimal fuss when setting up.
Friendly staff
Minutes away from sovereign Hill and the main town
Great caravan park and clean!!
Fantastic park, family friendly, clean and comfortable. We had a cabin with ensuite out side. Suited our family of five perfectly. .

Absolutely a pleasure of a place to have stayed at. Had the family cabin for 2 nights for a funeral in Melbourne and knowing we were coming home to this for the night was nothing but comfortable and like home. Heater was on as we arrived late and had everything we needed.

The sites are easy access with a caravan and it is close to the city centre. |Well maintained kitchen area and the bathrooms were clean and modern. |Check in was easy and the staff were friendly and helpful. |A good option with the caravan in  Ballarat for the weekend.
Nice park, very nice staff,

Not at all what we were expecting. Very run down. Mini gold was overgrown, ducks in mini golf and pool next door and playground tired. Room of cabin had intoxicating air freshener and some of the windows wouldn’t lock. We only stayed 1/3 days and at least they were understanding and gave a refund for nights not stayed. Gday perks fee quite high so hopefully we can find other parks elsewhere so we don’t feel like we have wasted the fee. Front desk staff lovely
Caravan stay

A must stay location if visiting the area.
Fantastic friendly service and excellent clean amenities.

Went there in April 2024 with a large van and booked an ensuite site. Holiday park is a little run down, mostly the play areas for the kids. Maybe we’ve been too spoilt with Big 4’s. Few areas could definitely use a touch up. We didn’t have enough room to even bring the awning out to set up outside.

Stayed in one of their 2 bedroom cottages, great space with good sized kitchen and bathroom, bed was comfortable for a great nights sleep. Nice quiet park, clean facilities. Huge IGA at end of street and easy drive to the centre of Ballarat. Oven & stove top with good size fridge in kitchen. Single reverse cycle air conditioner does the whole cottage, bathroom has a bathtub for those with small children.

We recently booked a powered caravan site with no trees. On arrival I asked the girl on reception again if there were no trees and once again she said “no trees”. On arrival at our site we found four big trees that were loosing their leaves that covered the whole site. Ridiculous. Perhaps the receptionist should get off their seats and check the park so that they can give people the correct information about the sites. The toilets were dirty, paper on the floor, broken toilet seats. The toilet paper holders were hanging open in a lot of them and they had a smell. The men’s toilets had water or something all over the toilet floors. Outside the ladies there was toilet paper or something laying on the ground for 2 days. What is wrong with the cleaners. There are a lot of permanents in this park as well and the sites are very untidy. I would not recommend this park. Very disappointing.
Моей семье очень понравилось это место.

Camped here for our first nights of family camping. Good spot. Kitchen Facilities were helpful for novices like us... Pots and pans, microwave etc in the camp kitchen. Games, toys and lounges and the TV we're a hit with the kids. Other facilities were good. Clean toilets and hot showers with food pressures. An IGA just down the road, Eureka museum behind.

Very modern furniture. Fully equipped kitchen. Clean facilities. City pool next door is free for park patrons. Staff friendly. Pretty convenient to Ballarat township about 5 minutes drive. Conveniently placed midway between Kryall Castle, Sovereign Hill and Lake Wendouree
Nice clean, renovated rooms. Plenty for the kids to do.   Would be good if there was a change machine in the kids play room.

We had booked ahead, however for family reasons we had to change our dates and weren’t sure how many days we could stay.|The staff were so understanding and let us just take it day by day.|We ended up having 4 nights at their lovely park, clean ,tidy and the new drive through are great. Top G’Day park👍

My family and I have stayed in the cabins here a number of times, and we always enjoy our visit. The staff are so welcoming and accommodating, and the cabins are tidy and well appointed. Solo travellers and big groups alike will be comfortable here and the park is very family friendly, with a playground and games room. The location is excellent - close to town, but far enough out that noise is not an issue. There’s also a bus stop at the front entrance.
Cabin was drab and cold. Not worth $100+ per night.
Good park beside the Eureka Centre. We had s nice drive through site.  The amenities were clean.
Visit Lilly's Cafe while you visit Eureka museum

I've stayed here twice now and each time has been fantastic.
The cabins are lovely and clean, the beds soft and welcoming.
The rec room is a fun way to spend time
It's fantasticly located near a pool (walking distance) a bus stop outside the entrance for thos (like me) who don't drive but still like to holiday.
But it's the staff that make the place amazing, always smiling friendly and ready to help wherever they can.

Will be back many more times.  It is the best budget friendly accommodation I've found yet.  Can't wait to go back.
Facilities are what you pay for. Cabin was clean and comfortable, just aging. We only stayed one night, so don’t have much to say on aspects other than room. No complaints here
Nice little cabins, perfect for a family weekend away. Close to amenities and attractions.
Our accommodation was immaculately clean, and the staff were very friendly and helpful.

Very friendly customer service
The double bed needs a electric
blanket on it
El lugar muy limpio. Todas las comodidades para quienes estamos en carpa o auto. Baños, cocina equipada, agua caliente, sala de estar! Y el personal muy amable
